name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in re:Optimized Vanilla
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

---

## Minecraft Version
Example: 26.1.2

## Modpack Version
Example: v1.0.0

---

## Operating System
- Windows
- Linux
- macOS

---

## Steps to Reproduce
Please describe exactly how we can reproduce the issue.
Example:
1. Launch the game
2. Join a world
3. Open the inventory
4. Equip an Elytra
5. The game crashes

---

## Expected Behavior
What should happen?

---

## Actual Behavior
What happened instead?

---

## Crash Report / Latest Log
Attach:
- crash-report
- latest.log

---

## Screenshots
If applicable.

---

## Additional Information
Anything else that might help.
